sourcesContent:
// src/tags-input.props.ts
import { createProps } from "@zag-js/types";
import { createSplitProps } from "@zag-js/utils";
var props = createProps()([
  "addOnPaste",
  "allowOverflow",
  "autoFocus",
  "blurBehavior",
  "delimiter",
  "dir",
  "disabled",
  "editable",
  "form",
  "getRootNode",
  "id",
  "ids",
  "inputValue",
  "invalid",
  "max",
  "maxLength",
  "name",
  "onFocusOutside",
  "onHighlightChange",
  "onInputValueChange",
  "onInteractOutside",
  "onPointerDownOutside",
  "onValueChange",
  "onValueInvalid",
  "placeholder",
  "required",
  "readOnly",
  "translations",
  "validate",
  "value",
  "defaultValue",
  "defaultInputValue"
]);
var splitProps = createSplitProps(props);
var itemProps = createProps()(["index", "disabled", "value"]);
var splitItemProps = createSplitProps(itemProps);
export {
  itemProps,
  props,
  splitItemProps,
  splitProps
};
